title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Municipalities and Regional Government to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to the Monson select board.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, December 18, 2025 -- The committee on Municipalities and Regional Government, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2668) of Ryan C. Fattman (by vote of the town) for legislation to the increase the membership of the select board of the town of Monson, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 2892).

actions.description:
Reported from the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government
 (under JR10)
Referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
